steps.title: Spot the structural shift
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a principle about how potters select clay. The second sentence introduces earthenware as a specific example.

steps.title: Match the right transition
steps.content: ”For example” introduces a specific instance to support a principle just stated. The other three either restate, dismiss prior information, or conclude—none of which work for introducing a supporting example. That matches choice D — D is correct.
